subcodes.first_line: O diffuser of the fragrances of God! In this time, when the morn of the Covenant shineth resplendent upon the horizons, divine confirmations shall verily be thine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر نفحات الله در این اوان که صبح میثاق مشرق بر آفاق است انوار تااید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution
